scope_rule: Only keep items that can materially block LeadFill launch.

active_backlog.why_it_blocks_launch: Manual visual truthfulness and premium-feel review is still required before public launch preparation can continue.
Pricing, refund, privacy, and terms copy must be final before commercial resubmission and live payment review.
Production payment cannot be verified until the live checkout, callback, and webhook configuration is fully defined.
The live SKU mapping must be correct before any public commercial launch.
Webhook verification is the source of truth for entitlement and must be proven in live mode.
Paid access cannot be considered commercially ready until refund and revoke behavior is understood and verified.
The support contact path must be final for billing, restore, and launch support.
Commercial copy and disclosures must stay truthful before re-review.
Chrome resubmission cannot be prepared cleanly until the final package is frozen.
Public commercial launch still requires explicit user approval.

current_known_non_backlog_risks.note: Important operational risk, but not currently the top launch blocker under the reset plan.
